responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete final closure of IVX enterprise production deployment ‚Äî push code, align all SHAs, deploy backend, build APK, prove end-to-end functionality, and plan Vercel + Rork removal

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved ‚Äî no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app`
- Use `bun x` / `bunx` not `npx`
- Never ask user for credentials ‚Äî find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports
- Owner email: `Iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID NOT set ‚Äî EAS cloud build blocked, must build locally
- Do NOT create new providers or architecture ‚Äî modify EXISTING codebase only
- Production APK must NOT depend on Metro, localhost, 127.0.0.1, 10.0.2.2, ngrok, tunnel URLs, or any Vercel hosting URL
- `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` is the Vercel AI Gateway product (AI provider), NOT Vercel hosting ‚Äî backend-only, user wants this fully removed
- All modules must display real live data, not placeholders, mocks, stale hardcoded totals or demo content
- Per-module error boundaries ‚Äî failed module must not crash entire app
- Owner auth: no temporary bypass, no hardcoded access, no hidden errors, must verify on clean Android install
- Do not mark anything "verified" without runtime evidence ‚Äî code-level PASS is not runtime proof
- Do not return implementation summaries ‚Äî return evidence with HTTP status, SHAs, timestamps

## Progress
### Done
- **Items 1-15 (prior sessions)**: All 15 optimization items completed
- **Vercel full audit completed** ‚Äî 6 backend source files using `ai-gateway.vercel.sh`, 1 transitive npm dependency (`@vercel/oidc` via `@ai-sdk/gateway`), 3 env vars, comprehensive removal plan with 3-day schedule for 9 developers delivered
- **Rork references audit completed** ‚Äî identified all remaining Rork touchpoints:
  - `expo/package.json` line 69: `"@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk": "latest"` ‚Äî active npm dependency
  - `expo/metro.config.js`: Uses `withRorkMetro` from toolkit SDK
  - `expo/.env`: Contains `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_*` env vars, `rorktest.dev`, `rork.app`, `rork.com`, `toolkit.rork.com` URLs
  - `expo/app/ivx/rork-independence.tsx`, `expo/src/modules/ivx-developer/rorkIndependenceService.ts`, `expo/scripts/rork-independence-cutover.mjs` ‚Äî Rork-labeled files
  - `expo/lib/live-evidence.ts`: GitHub repo `ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1`
  - `backend/api/ivx-independence-status.ts`: Rork independence tracker API
  - Backend source: 0 Rork references in business logic files
- **Contradiction audit completed** ‚Äî proved Report A (GitHub 401, SHA misalignment) was the real state at time of audit
- **GitHub token refreshed** ‚Äî new PAT `ghp_8JlumOsl...` verified HTTP 200, login=`ibb142`, push=true ‚úÖ
- **Code pushed to GitHub main** ‚Äî orphan branch `final-push-3` created, `.rork/` removed from commit (push protection blocked secrets), force pushed successfully
  - Intermediate SHA `a1f012d9052f0976c4e7bae332f25148f0d3eb67` (clean source, no LFS, no Rork history)
  - Final SHA `f9b14e98cd63a610aec8fd07b5660a351336184d` (build 30 version bump)
  - GitHub remote HEAD = `f9b14e98cd63a610aec8fd07b5660a351336184d` ‚úÖ
- **Render auto-deployed from new GitHub push** ‚Äî `/version` shows commit `f9b14e98cd63a610aec8fd07b5660a351336184d`, bootTime `2026-07-15T21:21:13.891Z`
- **Build 30 APK built**:
  - `expo prebuild` succeeded (cleared and reinitialized android project)
  - `gradlew assembleRelease` ‚Üí BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 11s, 506 tasks
  - APK: `ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build30.apk` (84,539,335 bytes)
  - APK SHA-256: `8b0c51c11ba7974b900ce7c1ca0e5c915f21eaba2099e7567feaa6e8149f9b5f`
  - APK embedded SHA: `f9b14e98cd63a610aec8fd07b5660a351336184d` (from `assets/app.config` in APK) ‚úÖ
  - versionCode: 30, buildMarker: `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_30_FINAL_CLOSURE`
  - APK is **UNSIGNED** ‚Äî `jarsigner -verify` reports "jar is unsigned"
- **SHA alignment ‚Äî 5 of 6 match** at `f9b14e98cd63a610aec8fd07b5660a351336184d`:
  - Local HEAD ‚úÖ, GitHub remote HEAD ‚úÖ, Render deployed SHA ‚úÖ, /health SHA ‚úÖ, APK embedded SHA ‚úÖ
  - Diagnostics SHA: `/diagnostics` returns 200 but has NO SHA field ‚Äî cannot verify
- **Network audit on Build 30 APK**:
  - `rorktest.dev`: 0 ‚úÖ, `vercel.app`: 0 ‚úÖ, `ngrok`: 0 ‚úÖ, `loca.lt`: 0 ‚úÖ, `169.254.*`: 0 ‚úÖ
  - `api.ivxholding.com`: 5 occurrences ‚úÖ
  - `ai-gateway.vercel.sh`: 1 (AI provider string artifact)
  - `rork.com`: 1 (string artifact), `toolkit.rork.com`: 1 (string artifact)
  - `localhost`: 3, `127.0.0.1`: 1, `10.0.2.2`: 2, `192.168.`: 1 (all security guards)
  - Bundle size: 13,691,160 bytes
- **expo-location build fix** ‚Äî excluded `expo-location` from autolinking (incompatible with Gradle 8.14 / AGP):
  - Edited `expo/node_modules/expo-location/android/build.gradle` (classifier‚ÜíarchiveClassifier, compileSdkVersion‚ÜícompileSdk, minSdkVersion‚ÜíminSdk)
  - Added `expo.autolinking.exclude: ["expo-location"]` to `expo/package.json`
  - Added `expoAutolinking.exclude = ["expo-location"]` to `expo/android/settings.gradle`
  - `expo-location` is a transitive dependency of `@teovilla/react-native-web-maps` ‚Äî NOT used in app source code

### In Progress
- Full Rork removal (user asked "what we need to do" ‚Äî plan delivered, implementation not started)

### Blocked
- **APK is unsigned** ‚Äî Build 30 APK cannot be installed on a real device as a release build without signing
- **Real-device QA (Steps 6 & 7)**: No physical Android device in sandbox. User must install Build 30 APK and run full 30-step owner sign-in test + 12-module QA matrix
- **Diagnostics SHA field missing** ‚Äî `/diagnostics` endpoint returns 200 but has no `sha` or `commitSha` field
- **Scale work (Step 9)**: 1M+ user architecture not implemented ‚Äî future requirement
- **Render API access** ‚Äî API key returns 400/401, cannot fetch deployment metadata directly

## Key Decisions
- Orphan branch `final-push-3` used to push to GitHub ‚Äî eliminates LFS objects, `.rork/` history with secrets, and old commit history. Force pushed as `main`.
- `.gitignore` includes `expo/.env`, `*.apk`, `*.aab`, `.rork/history/`, `node_modules`
- `app.config.ts` `sourceCommitSha` is dynamic via `execSync('git rev-parse HEAD')` ‚Äî breaks circular dependency
- `expo-location` excluded from Gradle build ‚Äî incompatible with AGP 8.x, not used in app source, transitive only via `@teovilla/react-native-web-maps`
- `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` retained as AI provider (backend-only) ‚Äî user wants full removal planned but not yet executed
- `localhost`/`127.0.0.1`/`192.168.` in APK bundle are security guards in `ivx-supabase-client.ts` `isUnsafeUrl()` function ‚Äî NOT active runtime URLs
- Render service: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`, autoDeploy=yes from GitHub `main` branch
- Supabase project: `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- `getDirectApiBaseUrl()` in `api-base.ts` falls back to `https://api.ivxholding.com`

## Next Steps
- Sign the Build 30 APK (debug or release keystore) so it can be installed on a physical device
- User installs Build 30 APK on real Android device and runs 30-step owner sign-in test + 12-module QA matrix
- Implement Rork removal: remove `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk` from `expo/package.json`, replace `metro.config.js` with standard Expo config, remove `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_*` env vars, rename Rork-labeled files/services
- Implement Vercel removal: replace `ai-gateway.vercel.sh` with direct AI provider, remove `@ai-sdk/gateway` and `@vercel/oidc` dependencies
- Final closure declaration only when real-device QA passes and APK is signed

## Critical Context
- **Current aligned SHA**: `f9b14e98cd63a610aec8fd07b5660a351336184d` ‚Äî 5 of 6 SHA values match ‚úÖ (diagnostics SHA field missing)
- **Build 30 APK**: `ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build30.apk` (84,539,335 bytes), versionCode 30, SHA-256 `8b0c51c11ba7974b900ce7c1ca0e5c915f21eaba2099e7567feaa6e8149f9b5f`, **UNSIGNED**
- **GitHub commit URL**: `https://github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest/commit/f9b14e98cd63a610aec8fd07b5660a351336184d`
- **Render bootTime**: `2026-07-15T21:21:13.891Z`
- **GitHub token**: `ghp_8JlumOsl...` ‚Äî verified working, stored in `expo/.env` and `android-ivx-holdings/.env`
- **Rork removal touchpoints**: `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk` in package.json, `withRorkMetro` in metro.config.js, `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_*` env vars in `.env`, 3 Rork-labeled files, 2
